name: Pipedrive
highlight_text: Best for: Visual pipelines with AI integrations
description:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__Source Pipedrive 

What Pipedrive Does

Pipedrive is a well-known, highly visual CRM. It leans into “deal pipeline first” thinking, then builds automation and AI around it. It's good for agencies that prefer visual clarity and smart nudges.

Key Features

  • Drag-and-drop pipelines
  • “Smart Contact Data” (auto-enriching)
  • AI assistant suggestions (which deal to focus on)
  • Workflow automations & triggers
  • Email sync & templates
  • Reporting dashboards

Pricing

  • Lite: $14/user/month
  • Growth: $24/user/month
  • Premium: $49/user/month
  • Ultimate: $69/user/month

Pipedrive offers specialized add-ons that may drive up the final price.

Pros

✅ Strong visual pipeline interface

✅ AI helps reduce decision fatigue on what to work on next + revenue forecasting

✅ Scalable features and strong integrations

Cons

🚫 Marketing automation is limited
🚫 Add-ons can escalate costs

‍
what_people_say:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__

What Customers Say

“Low learning curve. Customizable, add the fields you need. Sales teams have filterable views to stay on top of lead nurturing. Easy to see the status of all clients and filter by status.”

- Review collected by and hosted on G2.com.
